---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for PaperStack
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I find it frustrating when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Who Benefits

Who would benefit from this feature? (e.g., students, contributors, admins)

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or additional context here.
